description: UI Spotlight — Five trending UI/UX patterns each day, recreated as live interactive demos
format: v2: each day has 5 drops in `drops` array; folder contains 1..5/index.html + gallery index.html

days.title: Magnetism, Marquees, Bento, Scramble, ⌘K
days.description: Five hot UI patterns from the design web — magnetic buttons, infinite marquee, bento spotlight, text scramble, and a command palette.

days.title: Scroll, Contain, Type & Reveal
days.description: Five native web platform patterns — scroll-driven animations, container queries, variable fonts, cursor torch, and native dialog animations.

days.title: Scroll, Liquid, Split & Snap
days.description: Staggered parallax reveals, CSS Subgrid magazine layout, character-split text, SVG gooey buttons, and a physics carousel.
